user_waiver.scope_note: Thread-level instruction applies going forward; each pack records an explicit non-review waiver artifact so closeout evidence does not misrepresent a Claude review as completed.

parsed_review.summary: Full Claude review was explicitly waived by the user and is not counted as valid review evidence. CP00-958 closeout remains descriptor-only and depends on deterministic local/Hermes validation evidence; enterprise trust, runtime opening, and final human approval remain outside this waiver.
